name: OWASP_A03_Injection_Attacks
description: SQL Injection və ya Command Injection hücum cəhdləri.
search: index=web host="millibluesec.online" (uri_query="*UNION*SELECT*" OR uri_query="*DROP*TABLE*" OR uri_query="*<script>*" OR uri_query="*cat /etc/*") | stats count by clientip, uri, uri_query | search count > 0
